name: notebook-helper
description: Notebook-focused workflow prompts for creating, repairing, and explaining Jupyter notebooks inside Omiga.

interface.longDescription: Adds an Omiga-native skill that helps initialize empty notebooks, repair malformed ipynb JSON, and explain notebook execution plans.
defaultPrompt: Initialize this empty notebook with a Python starter cell.
Repair this ipynb and explain what changed.
Turn this analysis plan into notebook cells.
